entries.description: Worked on an industry leading Transportation  Management solution. The product helps clients manage transport throughout a global supply chain. Clients can optimize on costs, delivery time etc.
highlights: Developed a feature for multi-party billing, invoice/bill consolidation and adjustment post approval.
Developed a feature for sending tracking events on shipment groups. Events are applied to all eligible shipments in that particular shipment group after matching.

Developed a DB Migration Framework which allows developer to apply their db changes and run the scripts in
correct order.

entries.description: Worked on the Orders and Return Management System
highlights: Implemented a feature to charge Return abuser customers a return fee per return. Brought down return percentage from abusive users came down from over 60% to less than 20%.
Implemented Open box delivery for low trust customers. This has prevented fraudulent behavior with yearly savings of over Rs 35 cr.

Price Drop Refund: We have seen customers returning the product and then reordering if the price of the product drops within the return period. Myntra incurs logistics cost 3 times in such a scenario. Did the entire HLD, LLD, implementation, testing, deployment and monitoring of a feature to return the difference of original price and dropped price upto a threshold. This along with a return service fee, resulted in 500 bps reduction in returns/RTO from 41% to 36% of total items.
Implemented feature to incentivise Myntra Wallet adoption by giving instant refund. This increased wallet adoption by 220 bps.
